programme.title: Fist Power
programme.desc: Retired veteran CHAU and his six-year-old son DONG DONG play cheerfully at a park. Suddenly, a couple shows up with their bodyguards. The woman has stayed with CHAU while pregnant, but later left him for a rich tycoon CHIU. Today, they come to get their son. Helplessly, CHAU watches them take away the crying child. He swears to bring him back. CHEUK is captain of a mainland security team. One day, CHEUK picks up his nephew after school as usual. Yet, the school is surrounded by the police. In fact, CHAU has taken students' hostage demanding to see his son. Or, he will bomb the school...

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So, the legendary beggar, is actually born in a princely rich family. Like his father, So leads a lavish life. He once meets Ju Suan and falls in love with the virgin prostitute..

programme.title: Fist Power
programme.desc: Retired veteran CHAU and his six-year-old son DONG DONG play cheerfully at a park. Suddenly, a couple shows up with their bodyguards. The woman has stayed with CHAU while pregnant, but later left him for a rich tycoon CHIU. Today, they come to get their son. Helplessly, CHAU watches them take away the crying child. programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: So, the legendary beggar, is actually born in a princely rich family. Like his father, So leads a lavish life. He once meets Ju Suan and falls in love with the virgin prostitute..

programme.title: Hitman
programme.desc: With a box of worthless war bonds, an old man hired the King of Killers to assassinate a Japanese trade lord. In WWII, the trade lord's action had caused grave damage to the family of the King of Killers. He agrees to take the job and delivers in a few days. The Revenge Fund set up by the trade lord kicks in. Whoever avenges the trade lord's death, killing the killer and the force behind him, will receive a reward of $1 billion. The police assigns Inspector to watch the killers, with orders to leave them room when they kill each other. Among the killers vying for the reward are Fu, a new immigrant, and his agent, Wong a longtime loser trying to score a big one riding on Fu's coat-tail. After an elaborately orchestrated chain of events, Wong and Fu manage to accomplish their goal.

programme.title: The Kung Fu Scholar
programme.desc: Lun was a smart scholar who liked to do petty tricks. Lau had been practicing martial arts. Lun and Lau formed an odd couple of school and had small disputes all the time.

programme.title: Four Loves
programme.desc: The Cheng sisters, Li-fang and Li-chiung, leave war-torn Shanghai for Hong Kong. Li-chiung is rescued from robbers by Chien Pei-ling who decides to try out her luck in Hong Kong with the Chengs. They join Uncle and Aunt in Hong Kong. And they get along wonderfully with the daughter Cheng Hsiao-chuan. Li-chiung falls in love with Tony and elopes. That casts the first shadows on the friendships. It's Li-fang's turn to fall in love but both times Pei-ling steals her men. Hsiao-chuan meets Robert. A distraught Li-fang takes out a tutoring job in Macao where she falls in love. Pei-ling loves the same man...

programme.title: E10 - Serial Wedding Crasher
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a 911 call about cold fries leads to an arrest for murder; a fugitive is caught on the toilet; and more!

programme.title: E4 - Jalajhia Finklea
programme.desc: When beautiful Jalajhia Finklea vanished the day before her 18th birthday, her Wampanoag Tribe members immediately took action.

programme.title: E9 - Killed For The Cash
programme.desc: When a Texas gas store owner, Subir Chatterjee, 58, is shot inside his cheque-cashing booth in 2002, detectives suspect his killer is someone Subir knew.

programme.title: E121 - In A Lonely Place
programme.desc: After New Orleans detectives find a woman's burnt body in her car's trunk, they discover that her desperate 911 call went unheeded.

programme.title: E108 - Friends And Enemies
programme.desc: When three people are gunned down in a Tulsa home, detectives face two suspects, and a web of lies. Prosecutors are left with circumstantial evidence to clinch the case against a cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: E1 - Tim (Part A)
programme.desc: Tim suffers from feelings of abandonment and hoarding cars and parts is how he copes. Shortly after Tim and DeeDee married, they lost their home in a fire. After moving to a new home, Tim's hoarding began.

programme.title: E4 - One Punch Killer Or Protective Brother?
programme.desc: A frightening assault ends in tragedy when teenagers shoot splat ball guns at two brothers playing a nighttime basketball game. A fight ensues between the youths, leaving a 17-year-old dead at the scene.

programme.title: E2 - Blitz
programme.desc: After defeating Poland, Hitler looks west, planning an attack into France that will take advantage of a weak point in their defences. British Prime Minister Churchill scrambles to evacuate Allied troops.

programme.title: E113
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E63 - Uzes (Best-Of)
programme.desc: The best moments of the show in Uzes.

programme.title: E10 - The Best Puff Pastry Products On The Market
programme.desc: The show's team tests a dozen puff pastries to identify the crispiest and airiest ones, revealing significant disparities. Also: should sulfites in food be demonized; celebrating 50 years of Montreal's community gardens; the aromas of dahl.

programme.title: E21 - Ulgador/The Hermes Birkin Bag/French Linen/Black And White
programme.desc: Gabor and Rahel, founders of Ulgador and designers of gilded decorative items, join forces and expertise with Aude Taon, textile designer. programme.title: E7 - A Rendezvous With The Moon
programme.desc: Matthieu Fournier takes a trip upstream to understand the complexity of karst hydrogeology in the Swiss Jura. Plus a report that takes us meet small farmers and discover the fascinating role the Moon plays in their daily lives.

programme.title: E16 - The Soul Of The Beaufortain
programme.desc: In the northwest of Savoie, the village of Beaufort gave its name to the famous cheese of the same name. These magnificent green alpine pastures, ideal for livestock farming, are also a true land of champions. Marie Bochet, daughter of alpine farmers and a para-alpine skier with multiple medals, is one of the best ambassadors of her native massif.

programme.title: E2 - The Shepherd And His Lights
programme.desc: Francois Duruz, a former city dweller turned shepherd and watercolorist, finds in solitude, nature and light a profound balance. He has transformed his mountain refuge into an ephemeral gallery where landscapes, colors and emotions become one.

programme.title: E408 - Steel Man Steel / The Mystery Heroes
programme.desc: Sir Steel sails towards a dangerous purple slime waterfall unaware, as he's too busy meditating. // Drillnose Beetles are destroying the forest and so two mystery heroes have to reveal themselves.

programme.title: E511 - Pedro The Cowboy
programme.desc: Pedro Pony pretends he is a proper cowboy, telling everyone stories in the camp he has set up in the garden.

programme.title: E211 - Private Club / Green Algae
programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.title: E114 - The Crew Builds A Splash Park / The Crew Builds A Playroom
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: E201 - Explorer / Happy Parky / Storm
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.title: E102 - Movie
programme.desc: Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie.

programme.title: E408 - Steel Man Steel / The Mystery Heroes

programme.title: E122 - The Crew Builds A Giant Dam / The Crew Builds A Squirrel-Proof Farm
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town. // Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programme.title: E216 - The Crew Builds A Bowling Alley
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now!

programme.title: E107 - Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: E104 - Making Bread / From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: Barbapapa wants to teach his children to make bread, but things don't go as planned... // The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E106 - New Rocket
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: E205 - Ah! My Beautiful Castle / The Sand Is Running Away
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: E309 - A Dog For Dora / Super Pozole
programme.desc: Dora gets a new puppy that makes her cat Lucky jealous. After he runs away, Dora tracks Lucky down to remind him of how loved he is. / Today is the championship game, but all of Dora's friends have a cold. Dora helps them feel better in time to play!

programme.desc: The friends fix a broken toy robot, but it begins to act very strange due to the magic key they put in it. // King Thistle goes fishing with Mr Elf, Ben & Holly, and decides they should catch the meanest fish ever - Big Bad Barry - for their supper.

programme.title: E214 - The Louvre / Opposite Day
programme.desc: On a trip to Paris, the Barbapapa family will discover the most incredible museum: the Louvre! // Barbalala has decided to respect all the rules of the day of opposites.

programme.title: E618 - The Fastest Of Them All
programme.desc: When a greedy queen casts a spell to make a few of our friends go slow, Blaze and AJ must race her for the magical cure

programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: E2 - Blitz
programme.desc: After defeating Poland, Hitler looks west, planning an attack into France that will take advantage of a weak point in their defences. British Prime Minister Churchill scrambles to evacuate Allied troops.

programme.title: E3 - Precarious Products
programme.desc: Welcome to the unreal truth about everyday products of the past that were way more dangerous than meets the unsuspecting eye. Sensational items like mail-order dynamite and radioactive dishes.

programme.title: E1 - The Beginning
programme.desc: In September 1939, enabled by a secret pact between Adolf Hitler and Josef Stalin, Germany invades Poland with its lightning style of tank warfare, plunging Europe back into war.

programme.title: E7 - Chasing A Legend
programme.desc: Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years. Willie Edwards and his son Little Willie head to an isolated body of water to chase a behemoth that's causing trouble.

programme.title: E5 - Dark Science
programme.desc: The underbelly of science has never lurked as prominently as when it was harnessed for state-sanctioned 'research'. In newly published records, discover Stalin's trials to create a hybrid human-ape army.

programme.title: E225

Everyone can have an indepth understanding of Hong Kong and its people.

E7 - Victoria: The Southern Melting Pot
programme.desc: Sara goes to Melbourne to explore the food culture and find the best local ingredients. First stop, the Queen Victoria Market.

programme.title: E9 - Power Crash
programme.desc: Joe races to England to snap up a new plane, leaving Mikey to handle a crisis that grounds the Electra.

programme.title: E1 - Black Bear & Wild Rice
programme.desc: Daniel takes on the profound challenge of a bear hunt with fellow hunter and houndsman Sam. He also explores traditional methods for harvesting delicious wild rice with Arthur, Avani and Sara.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.title: E2 - Feral Hogs
programme.desc: The feral hog is one of the most formidable species on the planet. Possessing a unique combination of high reproductive capacity, size, and adaptability, the feral hog absolutely decimates entire ecosystems. With pork chops on his mind, Yia travels to the Florida/Alabama border to join Jennifer Bearden and Zack Franks who are doing their part to help control the rampant feral hog population menacing Florida.

programme.title: E10 - Magic Show Mayhem
programme.desc: Billy and Bea come to the rescue of a magician whose retirement home presentation has gone awry. Then Billy helps a maple syrup-maker by removing a stinky pest from his sugar shack.

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s”, he was unaware that it was to become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it is fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela on this high-impact journey of discovery as he uncovers some of lesser known facts in the conservation world. In particular, the role that hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern day conservation tool.

programme.title: E1 - Lionfish
programme.desc: The white sand beaches and emerald green waters of Destin, Florida are the setting for the 'World's Luckiest Fishing Villages.' Beneath the water's surface, it's a different story...one of the most formidable species, the lionfish, has been wreaking havoc on the local ecosystem for decades. The ecological advantage of the lionfish is its venomous spikes, used to corner prey and protect itself from predators, and giving it an advantage over native fish. Luckily, local conservationists and fishing captains discovered years ago that lionfish are as tasty as they are dangerous. Yia joins local biologist Alex Fogg as he works to mitigate the lionfish's damage by harvesting them one buttery, flaky bite at a time.

programme.desc: In Yorkshire, Rick discovers the history of the yorkshire pudding and how best to make it. He visits the UK's biggest tofu factory and cooks delicious veggie dishes at home.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: Donal Skehan and his trusty canine companion Max are headed west in search of the scenery, tranquility, and of course, the delicious food that Galway has to offer.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: This time, Jamie shows us a roast dinner cooked all together in one pot, cutting down on washing up but never on flavour; and his store-cupboard version of a speedy carbonara that can use up whatever veg you have to hand. He shares two ways to use pre-packed ingredients to make crowd-pleasing starters or sides, and two stars of Middle Eastern cuisine show how store-cupboard spices can transform everyday ingredients into truly mouth-watering meals.

programme.title: E6 - Italy
programme.desc: Deep in the Italian mountains, we peek behind the scenes at Forestis - a hotel designed to help guests connect to nature, instead of the Wi-Fi.

programme.title: Night Drama Serial 'Hoshi Shinichi's Short Story: Insomnia' Encore (Final)
programme.desc: Hoshi Shinichi wrote more than 1000 stories in his life, and they are still read by many people in the current generation. His short stories have the essences of mysterious science fiction, fantasy, and irony against human and society. This program depicts the world of his masterpieces in live-action drama.

TFC Kids Zone
programme.desc: Fun and learning for pre-schoolers

programme.title: 2 Good 2 Be True[Live]
programme.desc: Ali, a hardworking nurse with big dreams, crosses paths with Eloy, a clever mechanic secretly living a double life as a con artist and law student. Their rocky first meeting leads to an unexpected partnership involving a wealthy old man, hidden identities, family secrets, and emotional healing. As love grows amid deception, the series explores trust, redemption, and second chances, blending romance, comedy, and drama.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Goin' Bulilit S15[Live]
programme.desc: A gag show with child actors playing adult roles, doing gags, sketches and segments. Instead of playing roles based on their own age, child actors are made to portray adult characters like Doctors, Teachers, Married Couples, etc.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]

programme.title: E1 - Mojo Mail
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E21 - Escape
programme.desc: When Mum and Dad describe a made-up world where they can relax without the girls, Bluey and Bingo decide to burst into their fantasy and chase them down. How will Mum and Dad escape?

programme.title: E36 - Dirt
programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E37 - The Decider
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: E12 - Andy And The Bowerbird
programme.desc: Andy heads to the jungles of Papua New Guinea and meets a Bowerbird building its nest.

programme.title: E45 - The Singing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but it's a long way back. Don't worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: E44 - The Comedy Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: E43 - The Looking After Badge
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: E4 - The Continent Of Africa
programme.desc: Glitch takes Tala to the continent of Africa to help her with an Academy project.

programme.title: E3 - Monteverde Cloud Forest, Costa Rica
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save a rare bird's nest and find a lost trophy?

programme.title: E17 - Cleo The Road Engine
programme.desc: Inventor Ruth has a new steam powered car to try out. But Cleo the car is headstrong and when Thomas challenges her to a race she takes some risks to guarantee a win.

programme.title: E4 - Sticker Swap
programme.desc: Sarah is keen to complete her sticker album, so sets off to see if her friends can help.

programme.title: E5 - Pumpkin
programme.desc: Stanley must keep Myrtle's pumpkin safe from Speedy the snail. He builds a series of obstacles and defences to protect it from the tenacious Speedy who tests Stanley's ingenuity.

programme.title: E20 - Driving
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E20 - The Crazy Golf Badge
programme.desc: It's crazy golf time and the everyone has to make their own courses.

programme.desc: It's the exceptional painter, Spinach, creating Kiwi's portrait, if Kiwi can keep still.

programme.title: E1 - Mojo Mail
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: E24 - Faceytalk
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: E18 - The In Charge Badge
programme.desc: What are the rules about being in charge? Make a plan, keep everyone happy, make decisions, lead by example and listen. Roly takes that one so seriously he gets a bit overwhelmed.

programme.title: E17 - The World Record
programme.desc: The Squirrels want to get a World Record, but in what? And Duggee is too busy to help. 'If only we had more Duggee's' muses Tag. Which gives Norrie a record-breaking idea...

programme.title: E21 - Escape
programme.desc: When Mum and Dad describe a made-up world where they can relax without the girls, Bluey and Bingo decide to burst into their fantasy and chase them down. How will Mum and Dad escape?

programme.desc: Judo desperately wants to play in the dirt with Bluey and Bingo, but she is not supposed to get herself dirty.

programme.title: E44 - The Comedy Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels go to see what Duggee is doing but on the way Tag stumbles on some toy blocks and hurts his knee. How can they make him feel better? Happy's mum says laughter is the best medicine.

programme.title: E19 - The Laughter Badge
programme.desc: From sensible chuckles and nervous giggles to Duggee's infectious laughter, once everyone starts, it's so hard to stop. What were they laughing about again? Anyone remember?

programme.title: E46 - The Playing Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: E45 - The Singing Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the Squirrels are out on a walk in the countryside. Its been a long walk and the squirrels are starting to get tired, but it's a long way back. Don't worry, Duggee has his singing badge.

programme.title: E21 - Tina
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: E22 - Whale Watching
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: E23 - Family Meeting
programme.desc: When Dad's accused of fluffing in Bluey's face as he climbed out of bed, he's put on trial with Mum as the judge, and Bluey and Bingo as witnesses. Bluey might also have to explain what she was doing there.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: The cutting edge news of SZ. First reporting the news of political ,financial condition and the people's livelihood.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述世界排名第一的拳擊選手李權淑在令全韓國為之瘋狂後突然引退並銷聲匿跡；某一天體育經理人的出現並提出了一個讓她無法拒絕的復出提議，而隨之發生的故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.desc: The way animals mate is fascinating. The antechinus, an indigenous Australian marsupial, risks everything during a one-week period of mating, and eventually dies bravely.

programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: E1 - Iraqi Salmon & Date Brownies
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E1 - Baby John's Big Family Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a big family adventure with Baby John! The fun starts with a road trip to visit the Grand Canyon, where the family learns all about their RV along the way. Then, the family divides into two teams, sailors vs. pirates, for a fun & competitive game of mini golf! The adventure continues as Jill is feeling a little nervous for her first parade, but with the help of her friends, she learns to march & spin her baton in no time!

programme.title: E2 - Causing Chaos All Over Town!
programme.desc: Arpo & Baby Daniel are causing chaos all over town! The adventure starts at the supermarket when Daniel runs off with a giant lollipop, leading to a wild chase with Arpo's rockets on the fritz. Then, a relaxing fishing picnic turns into a wilderness survival test when a thieving squirrel tries to steal their food! Plus, the family gets a mischievous new puppy that Arpo has to keep from making messes & a stroller goes on the loose, forcing Arpo to chase it through town!

programme.title: E2 - When Friends Need a Hero!
programme.desc: Sometimes friends need a hero, & Buster is always ready to help! When he gets caught in a scary storm, he rushes to shelter, but then he spots his friend Scout, stuck in a muddy puddle! Buster has to muster all his courage to go back out & rescue her. But sometimes, even heroes need help! On another day, Buster gets stuck in the mud himself & has to be towed out by Terry Tractor. From stopping a runaway train to standing up to a bully, Buster is always there for his friends.

programme.title: E5 - Let's Make, Play & Learn with JJ!
programme.desc: Get ready to make, play & learn with JJ! First, find out what JJ's favorite pizza toppings are as you sing along to this yummy adventure. Then, Dad shows JJ how to make a healthy & delicious snack: fresh fruit ice cream! The hands-on fun continues as TomTom shows JJ how to be a 'toy mechanic' & fix his favorite toy school bus when a wheel pops off. From learning about veggies to becoming 'Clean Machines,' it's a day of creative fun!

programme.title: E3 - The Ultimate Outdoor Play Day!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate outdoor play day! Mummy & Daddy take the kids to the park to fly colorful Japanese koinobori kites. Then, Mia & Max head to the pond to feed the ducks, but are shocked to find there are no ducks there! They must go on an adventure to find them. The outdoor fun continues as Mummy sets up a painting session in the park, where the kids have fun discovering new colors with their fingers, hands & feet!

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Peanut butter cups feature an amazing history and a one-of-a-kind butterscotch coating; starting with giant slabs of butter, three million Sara Lee pound cakes are produced every year; three types of citrus go from tree to jar at this Florida orchard; and a butter chicken cooking sauce is made at a university research facility.

E7
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E8 - 開啟「睡眠大作戰」
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E57
programme.desc: 兼顧情緒價值輸出，為女性量身打造兼具時尚審美與人文關懷的變裝微綜藝，全方位多角度地向社會傳遞積極的生活態度；種草生活好物、推薦文旅線路、科普健康知識。

programme.title: E5 - 學霸如何高情商應答
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E48 - 史上最完美身材男嘉賓亮相
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: European Narcos - Part 2 - The Weakness Of States
programme.desc: In Rotterdam, local street gangs join forces with Colombians to build their empire. Driven by raging demand, the cocaine trade has triggered an unprecedented wave of violence.

programme.title: On Tram Tracks Through WrocŁAw - A City In Transition
programme.desc: The best way to appreciate Wrocław is from tram line No. 1. It has been rolling through the city for 140 years - passing rubble, after the war, and past renovated facades, modern apartment blocks and the grassy banks of the River Oder, today.

programme.title: E101 - Relax, Wanda!/Fair Share/Bubble Party
programme.desc: Constantly on the lookout for the wolf, Wanda is on edge! Trico introduces the ewe to the joys of fishing to help her relax...but when her friend finally winds down, Trico is alone and struggles to protect the flock.

programme.title: E3 - Blade Games/Nap Spot
programme.desc: Benson learns a better way to motivate.

programme.title: E429 - Flying Sands/Symphony For Lemmings/Interplanetary Cabin
programme.desc: While Grizzy struggles to pick coconuts that are too high up, the Lemmings find a magic conch.

programme.title: E3 - Blade Games/Nap Spot
programme.desc: Benson learns a better way to motivate.

programme.title: E25 - Mirror Gem/Ocean Gem/House Guest
programme.desc: Steven befriends a magical mirror that can mysteriously communicate with him.

programme.title: E121 - Bright Lights, Black Hearts/Buggin' The Buggs/Franken-Fight/Billy Bajillions/The Filt
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max stop by the graveyard set of Gwen's favourite TV show, The Unalivers, but when Ben discovers its lead, Michael Morningstar, is an energy vampire, he goes alien to show the world the real star of the show: Heatblast.

programme.title: E35 - An Adventure In The Jungle/A Day In The Life Of Cancan
programme.desc: Traces of the Bobobobobone are found in the jungle of district 9. A screaming battle begins. The Bobobobobone falls into a lake full of piranhas.

programme.title: E140 - Basketbugs / A Skate Of Confusion!/Happy Birdy To You/Spring Forward, Fall Flat/Board
programme.desc: Bugs Bunny plays some streetball.

programme.title: E15 - Hide N' Seek/No Day Like Snow Day
programme.desc: Unikitty is proud to be the reigning champ of Hide N' Seek Day. But when Unikitty finds everyone in the kingdom except for Richard, she hunts him down at all costs. Will Richard continue to elude the Princess at her favorite game, and if so, how?!

programme.title: E145 - Trico's Treats/Vacuum Cleaner Frenzy/Mighty Mite
programme.desc: To stave off Wolf’s hunger, Trico gives him a little dry dog food. While Trico would prefer to ration the kibble, Wanda hands it out indiscriminately—until there’s only one left! Wolf avidly hunts down the final treat.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Bloop
programme.desc: The Nektons try to identify a unique life-form. Just as Ant discovers its true nature, an underwater mining machine threatens to destroy it!

programme.title: Fish in Muddy Burrows
programme.desc: Mudskipper fish live on land in muddy burrows. They come out at low tide to look for small plants and animal matter to eat. They can hold water in their gills and by keeping their skin moist they can breathe through it like amphibians do.

programme.title: Doki's Double Trouble
programme.desc: While touring Cape Canaveral, Florida, the Team meets Doki's doppelganger, an astronaut named Duncan. Doki excitedly asks - what does it take to be an astronaut? – and Duncan gives him the chance to find out!

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Kloe visits her family in Hungary, where she plans to find inspiration for her upcoming solo gala. Meanwhile, Josh and Ellie compete at a higher level for the first time.

programme.title: The Kidney Cleaning Machine
programme.desc: The doctors check out the cleaning power of our kidneys, and the Ouch-Mobile is open for medical mysteries. Dr Xand tries out some vision-shifting spectacles. In the emergency room, one patient has an unusual break in his leg, and another has a stone stuck in his ear.

programme.title: Fish in Muddy Burrows
programme.desc: Mudskipper fish live on land in muddy burrows. They come out at low tide to look for small plants and animal matter to eat. They can hold water in their gills and by keeping their skin moist they can breathe through it like amphibians do.

programme.title: Flight of the Godwits
programme.desc: When Newts needs instructions on how to film the godwits migrating, but Darwin is stuck in the treehouse, they build a series of listening mirrors to keep in communication.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Rafa
programme.desc: Meet the Loro Parque Foundation Scientific Director - Rafa, also known as the ‘Birdman of Loro Parque'. He wears the badge with pride and every day he surrounds himself with all things ornithological - from parrots and puffins to penguins.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: Kloe visits her family in Hungary, where she plans to find inspiration for her upcoming solo gala. Meanwhile, Josh and Ellie compete at a higher level for the first time.

programme.title: Trip to South Korea
programme.desc: Zoe's mum doesn't like cakes, so Zoe isn't sure what to make for her birthday. Alim suggests visiting their penfriend Kachiko, who lives in South Korea. They meet up with her on the beach.

programme.title: Measuring Time
programme.desc: Back in the Middle Ages, methods for telling the time are a far cry from the ones we know today. Church bells and the position of the sun are pretty much all they've got. So inventors are constantly trying to come up with all kinds of new systems to measure time.

programme.title: The Midnight Ninja Mystery
programme.desc: When it appears that a midnight vandal is damaging Max's entry in the town's “Most Beautiful Public Garden” project, Addison goes undercover ninja to save the day.

programme.title: Mai's Wagon
programme.desc: When Oto and Vik accidentally break Mai's wagon, they try to hide the truth from Mai. The boys soon discover that honesty is best.

programme.title: An Almost Villain
programme.desc: Riwahl realizes that he will never be a real superhero, so he decides to become a supervillain. When Cleopatra shows up to catch Sprinter, Riwahl tries to help her. It becomes clear that he is not a villain.

programme.title: Old Roads
programme.desc: The detention team follows their clue to a haunted church that supposedly reveals your darkest fears. The team splits up to cover more ground. Scared and alone, they realise someone or something is following them.

programme.title: Good Whale Hunting
programme.desc: Desperate for funding, the gang goes to an upscale charity event to meet some potential investors. Nobody takes the kids seriously until a live stream goes wrong, and they have an opportunity to demonstrate their anti-troll invention in real-time.

programme.title: The Pitcher Plant and a Very Sweet Trap
programme.desc: The carnivorous pitcher plants have evolved to trap and digest insects. The small creatures are lured in with sweet nectar. The biggest pitchers are found on the slopes of Mount Kinabalu in Borneo. These can hold over a litre of fluid.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met...a Feather Boa
programme.desc: Today Henry meets a Feather Boa, and he becomes a Private Investigator to help Feather Boa solve the mystery of missing clothes!

programme.title: White-Tailed Eagle
programme.desc: Fleabag and Plop are very impressed by the white-tailed eagle. Grey Squirrel has her suspicions about the eagle and is busy constructing a tinfoil hat. And Franky tells the cubs all about the day he met their mother.

programme.title: Mundi's Day Off
programme.desc: How could we have superpowers? The team flies off to Germany, to borrow some high-tech ‘super' suits. They try using a climbing suit, a jet pack and a powerlifting suit, but none is able to recover the Frisbee.

programme.title: Kevin Bergquist: Martial Arts Champ
programme.desc: Karate champion and GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS holder Kevin Bergquist meets with Will Munford and shares the fundamentals of staying positive and focused. Kevin also teaches Will about confidence and how to use that to his advantage.

programme.title: The Friend (Courteney Cox) and the Showman (Channing Tatum)
programme.desc: In this episode of Becoming Xtraordinary presented by Bear Grylls, award-winning actress and producer Courteney Cox, of Friends, recounts how she became a TV star and Channing Tatum reflects on how he went from a struggling student to a recognized Hollywood actor.

programme.title: Tomorrow on TV
programme.desc: New multimedia cameras that introduce new ways to experience live events have been developed at Hasselt University. Through an innovative circular camera system, live streaming of 360 degree videos is now possible.

programme.title: Superhero Spinners
programme.desc: Alexia and Kloe are off to London to meet Dr. Xand and the Operation Ouch team to see if a scientist can figure out why they don't get dizzy when they spin. Izzy has a very important speed trial to see if she has what it takes to join the Olympic squad.

programme.title: The Pitcher Plant and a Very Sweet Trap
programme.desc: The carnivorous pitcher plants have evolved to trap and digest insects. The small creatures are lured in with sweet nectar. The biggest pitchers are found on the slopes of Mount Kinabalu in Borneo. These can hold over a litre of fluid.

programme.title: Kiwifruit Valley Cross Country
programme.desc: When Darwin's camera breaks just before the Kiwifruit Valley Cross Country, he has to come up with a new way to take photos of the big event.

programme.title: What Does Space Sound Like?
programme.desc: Sound waves require a medium to travel through. Since space is a big empty void, there can't be sound waves in space. But there are other types of waves that can travel through a vacuum.

programme.title: Superhero Spinners

programme.title: Eye On Africa
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. The Truth or Fake is a short program designed to alert everyone to the dangers of fake news. The hosts emphasize that media literacy is a key part of the broad fight against disinformation.

programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: A Propos[Live]
programme.desc: A comprehensive and in-depth look at a single story making headlines around the world, exploring its context, key developments, and the wider impact it is having across different countries and communities.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Reporters
programme.desc: Reporters presents various reports by team of correspondents from all over the world regarding hot button issues. Directly from the suburbs of Ghana's capital Accra or from Chile, Israel or USA, from any place of the globe the reporters tell latest stories and highlight what is going on.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E5 - Hluhluwe-Imfolozi
programme.desc: In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent – Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil. Hunted almost to extinction at the end of the 19th century, the park’s establishment gave rhinos a lifeline – breeding them back from extinction.

programme.title: E4 - The Punks Strike Back
programme.desc: After the dry season lowers the waters, siblings Kimba and Maya risk crossing the river to search for their parents. They run the gauntlet of the densest populations of crocs and hippos in Africa, and face an even greater threat on the other side.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E1 - Head & Neck
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered why mandrills have such colorful faces, why vultures are bald, or even why hammerheads have, well, hammer-shaped heads? Discover how animals managed to survive by evolving from the neck up.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E2 - Lean on Me
programme.desc: Observe blossoming friendships and interspecies bonds in nursery school, and peek inside a bromance among junior-school buds Valentino, Yutris and Madara. See distractible Beni lean into his love of food and get a beating from a more-senior pupil.

programme.desc: In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent – Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil. Hunted almost to extinction at the end of the 19th century, the park’s establishment gave rhinos a lifeline – breeding them back from extinction.

programme.title: E4 - The Punks Strike Back
programme.desc: After the dry season lowers the waters, siblings Kimba and Maya risk crossing the river to search for their parents. They run the gauntlet of the densest populations of crocs and hippos in Africa, and face an even greater threat on the other side.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E5 - Hluhluwe-Imfolozi
programme.desc: In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent – Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil. Hunted almost to extinction at the end of the 19th century, the park’s establishment gave rhinos a lifeline – breeding them back from extinction.

Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil. Hunted almost to extinction at the end of the 19th century, the park’s establishment gave rhinos a lifeline – breeding them back from extinction.

programme.title: E1 - Head & Neck
programme.desc: Have you ever wondered why mandrills have such colorful faces, why vultures are bald, or even why hammerheads have, well, hammer-shaped heads? Discover how animals managed to survive by evolving from the neck up.

programme.title: E4 - The Lower Zambezi
programme.desc: Food, water and shelter are essential to all life on earth from the smallest of beings to the largest, and along the banks of one of Africa’s greatest rivers, some animals struggle while others thrive. A rhythm drives all animals as they journey in search of what they need to survive, and each must decide where and when to move if they’re to succeed... These are the magical worlds of the Lower Zambezi.

programme.title: E5 - Hluhluwe-Imfolozi
programme.desc: In the heart of Zululand, South Africa, lies the oldest game reserve on the African continent – Hluhluwe-iMfolozi. Here, Southern white rhinos have found protection from people in times of turmoil. Hunted almost to extinction at the end of the 19th century, the park’s establishment gave rhinos a lifeline – breeding them back from extinction.

programme.title: E5 - Hollywoods Held Hostage
programme.desc: During the last few weeks of the dry season, the prides stick close to the only available water in the river. But in Luangwa, that proximity spells danger - especially when the scent of a hippo kill compels the Hollywoods to cross the river.

programme.title: E1 - A Wild Education
programme.desc: Welcome baby orangutan Topan, an orphan in need of a surrogate mom. Watch her learning journey in nursery school while her fellow students move through junior, senior, and wild-immersion schools. Meanwhile, 16-year-old Kasper preps for graduation.

programme.title: E2 - Lean on Me
programme.desc: Observe blossoming friendships and interspecies bonds in nursery school, and peek inside a bromance among junior-school buds Valentino, Yutris and Madara. See distractible Beni lean into his love of food and get a beating from a more-senior pupil.

programme.desc: Benny struggles to rein in Luan and her practical jokes when she becomes his coworker at the Burpin'Burger.

programme.title: E115 - The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: E222 - Lay Lay Gets Ready to Rumble Rumble
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are enlisted to help save the school's boxing club, and set up a fight between Sadie and Gigi that is sure to draw a crowd. Now all that's left to do is train Sadie to fight. How hard can it be?

programme.title: E109 - Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Henry Hart's back and stealing Ray's attention from crime fighting so Danger Force is forced to go on a bunch of exhausting missions without Captain Man. But the mood dims when a scary Bounty Hunter from Dystopia comes to Swellview looking for Henry.

programme.title: E904 - Pet Project / Cuff Break
programme.desc: When Mom and the twins win a raffle to spend a weekend at a resort, Lana struggles to leave her pets behind. // After Lincoln tests a magic trick on Grouse, they get handcuffed together and Grouse has to spend the day at middle school.

programme.title: E273 - Potato Puff
programme.desc: Mrs. Puff's new substitute teacher gives SpongeBob a crash course in driving.

programme.title: E201 - The Patrick Show Cashes In
programme.desc: In this ad-packed variety episode, The Patrick Show sells merchandise in order to fund its second season.

programme.title: E704 - Bye, Bye, Birthday / Tough Guise
programme.desc: Tired of the yearly cheer surrounding her birthday, Lucy casts a spell so her family will forget what day it is. // When Zach is given detention, Rusty and the rest of their friends try to toughen up him up so he'll fit in.

programme.title: E107 - The Truth is Out There
programme.desc: Acu thinks a fish-loving alien is in town, and Mica offers to help him track it down.

programme.desc: When Hope takes Gran Gran's special ladle to the park to play it ends up at Professor Lopez's archaeological dig.

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E38
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: The Plot
programme.desc: Young-il is a plotter who manipulates murder-for-hire cases to look like accidents. Nobody knows those accidents are in fact perfectly plotted, planned murders. After finishing a flawlessly plotted case with no trace of evidence left behind, Young-il receives a new request. His new target is a prominent political figure who is always under the spotlight. Even with the higher risk of getting exposed, Young-il decides to take the case with his team members, Jackie, Wol-cheon, and Jeom-man. When the plot is ready after immaculate preparation and numerous rehearsals, the team finally makes its move, but some unexpected trouble threatens Young-il's perfect plan.
